title: Allogene Therapeutics Announces ALPHA3 Trial-in-Progress Poster Presentation at ASH Annual Meeting
text: Allogene announced a trial-in-progress poster presentation on the ALPHA3 study at the American Society of Hematology (ASH) Annual Meeting. The presentation updated the scientific community on enrollment progress and clinical observations from the pivotal Phase 2 ALPHA3 trial evaluating cemacabtagene ansegedleucel (cema-cel) in first-line consolidation for large B-cell lymphoma. This presentation reinforced the clinical importance of the ALPHA3 program and Allogene's progress toward a potential regulatory milestone.
